releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
## what's changed
* :sparkles: Add settings by @GuardKenzie in https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/pull/7

## new contributors

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.4.1...1.5.0

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
- improve block suggestions performance
- code formatting

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.4.0...1.4.1

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
- just addressing feedback from [community plugins submission review](https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/3923#issuecomment-2251355593)
  - RIP settings menu. _(it'll be back when it has actual settings)_

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.3.3...1.4.0

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
- no user-facing changes
- remove unused code, rename sample structures

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.3.2...1.3.3

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
- remove heading from settings
- avoid use of `innerHTML`

both in service of plugin guidelines: https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.3.0...1.3.2

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
- trim block content after removing block ref (#5)
- search ref (in addition to block content, file path)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
- :bug: fixed: suggestions now properly clickable (no flicker/weird behavior)
- unlinkify links in suggestions (just styled as underlined)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
various quality of life and style improvements

- muted smalltext
- shortened smalltext
- block ref appended to basename in smalltext
- block ref removed from content preview
- list limit
- search placeholder
- ability to search by file path

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
:bug: Use `TFile.basename` instead of `.name` to avoid `.md` extension when using embed function.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tyler-dot-earth/obsidian-blockreffer/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: tyler-dot-earth
releases.description:
Initial release.

Search and embed blocks with `^block-references` aka `^block-refs` aka `^block-ids`.
